listings.title: Heritage 535 electric guitar
listings.body: Brand new Heritage 535. Not played for more than 30 minutes. It was a gift and I can't play due to nerve damage in my hand. I've had it for 2 months hoping that would improve. It's not. Flame maple top and back, rosewood fingerboard. If you know the brand you know these are made in the original Gibson factory by the original staff and their trained luthiers. Most of reviews tell of better fit and finish than Gibson. And all attest to the. quality and great sound. Comes in heritage hard case and I even have the original Heritage shipping box it came in. Selling all my guitars. Others listed on Craigslist.

listings.title: Midea Air Conditioner $200 (btu 8,000)
listings.body: Excellent Working Condition show contact info

listings.title: Ninja Creami Deluxe 11 in 1
listings.body: Like new Ninja Creami Deluxe 11 in 1 machine with 4 ice cream pint containers. Barely used and in excellent/new working condition. Model NC501. Comes in box. Cash only please.

listings.title: Lionel O Gauge Set - Pennsylvania Flyer 565
listings.body: Christmas present to my son about 15 years ago, quickly supplanted by his interest in HO Scale.  Has sat for all these years, near new condition.  In addition to the basic kit, includes trees, structures, bridge, people, telephone poles.  Engine is awesome and very heavy.  Set up in my office in Larchmont - I just did a straight section because with the curves it won't fit on the table.  Works great except not reversing direction for some reason [edit: I got it working, it's just a switch on the train that allows it to go in either direction].  These fetch a good price out there, engine alone tends to sell for nearly $100 from what I can see.  Entire setup goes to the first person who shows up here with $80.  If interested please respond with something that shows you are an actual human, thanks.
